transcript.text: Daniel and I have spent a ton of time today chatting through a couple of things, but, you know, quick update on fundraising is that process has been way, way effing harder than, I think, probably the hardest thing so far that I've done since starting this company by far.
And not because it's hard, like, just, like, the work itself is also just the unpredictability of, like, each investor is completely different.
They're all thinking about things completely different.
They all have different levels of context and understanding about AI, go-to-market, marketing, and just, like, everything else, right?
Also, like, every investor is, like, that's one thing that Karan warned us about, is that Series B is the hardest, because you're in between.
So, some are more vision-driven, some are more, like, numbers-driven, so.
One of them asked, what was our IPO plan in the next three to five years?
So, that tells you what you need to know.
That would be a not even Google IPO in five years.
I don't think there's been any successful IPO that has a market cap of about $100 million that went IPO within five years of corporation.
So, and, you know, so, but I think it's been a really helpful process because it kind of really has forced a lot of, like, clarity of thinking.
And, like, what are the things we should be optimizing for as a company?
You know, I would say we've done a great job in a very short period of time and being really intentional as things come up to solve the right things.
And I think the biggest question mark that is within our control and the next, let's call it, like, six months is renewal and retention.
Like, there's, like, no doubt in the view, investors, like, Iconic being one of them, that...
I got it and kind of understood a lot of it, but passed.
They passed because we haven't had a renewal cycle or much renewal cycles, right, to kind of prove it out.

But then it's also super clear that, like, if it's taking these investors three, four, five meetings to connect the dots, and even then they kind of miss a lot of things, it's like I can't even imagine our own employees.
Like, you know, was talking to George, George was like, yeah, it took me like three months to even understand, like, everything.
Sitting next to us.
Sitting next to us, right, and, like, being in the weeds, and so that's not good, right?

Like, so I need to do, personally, I need to do a better job of, I think, like, connecting those dots, and we need to do a better job of, like, communicating to everyone here, like, what role they're playing and what we're trying to optimize for in that.
And so...

So, like, the TLDR, I think, is, like, we're still going through a process, we're still talking to investors, but there's, I think, a good chance that we'll need to go heads down and, you know, probably, like, stick our hat up again in, like, maybe early next year or something, you know?
And so, like, the good news is, I think this month, we've already collected 980K, and so there's, I mean, like, we're not burning a lot of money at all.

And so, like, we're fairly efficient, we're closing deals, and so I think there's a lot of, like, our ability to be successful is really within our control with the resources we have, and capital can be an additional fuel, but not the reason we're successful or not, like additional capital, mean, right?
But with that being said, I do think, like, we need to be a lot more intentional as teams to figure out, like, how we prioritize, what are the guardrails we're operating under, you know?
so that's ultimately, like, what, like...

I want to try for us to nail it down so that we can have in the next week or so, like a much clearer story to tell the rest of the company, the priorities, what are we measuring, you know, but I don't know if there's anything in it.
I was just going to say that some of those investors, like they have different goals, some of them got it, like I think none of them would burn bridges or they're like, what the  is this?

So it was more like, some of them were like more concerned about how are going to scale the services, which is something that we have to figure out for ourselves, just to make that clear to the whole board and like the roadmap for that.
Some of them were like, some looking for like, okay, we need more cycles or more expansions.
And we still have, men was the last one that we were actually like big at, you know, and they, and they are more in the sense of like, same vibe than current.
They're more interested in investing on the vision and on the people than on precise numbers, and they're paying for like 10 to 15 years as the lifespan of the investment.
So that will go through, we'll have that on Monday.
Everyone else was more like trying to figure out how this can be, and also everybody's also burned by market.
So we have two things that we have against us is we have a lot around people executing the work, and they're not used to that.
The other one is market.
The marketing category puts us into a burden that other categories don't have, because there is no sales source, or like everybody has been burned by marketing before.
So like the best that you can come up with, like this  like Stenrush, you know, and nobody's excited about Stenrush.
Stenrush is a very small, multiple, and things like that.
So those are the main things that we're playing against us.
Stenrush is

default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Update on fundraising progress and discuss strategic priorities for the company.](https://fathom.video/share/dstGpQESj4aYGXzxejWtdkbWtxcSnaAA?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Fundraising for Series B has been exceptionally challenging due to diverse investor perspectives and market conditions](https://fathom.video/share/dstGpQESj4aYGXzxejWtdkbWtxcSnaAA?tab=summary&timestamp=20.0)
  - [Company is financially stable (980K collected this month) but may need to postpone fundraising efforts until early next year](https://fathom.video/share/dstGpQESj4aYGXzxejWtdkbWtxcSnaAA?tab=summary&timestamp=197.0)
  - [Critical focus areas: improving internal communication, clarifying roles, and optimizing for renewal and retention in the next 6 months](https://fathom.video/share/dstGpQESj4aYGXzxejWtdkbWtxcSnaAA?tab=summary&timestamp=162.0)
  - [Need to develop a clearer narrative and prioritization strategy to communicate to the company and investors](https://fathom.video/share/dstGpQESj4aYGXzxejWtdkbWtxcSnaAA?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)

## Topics

### Fundraising Challenges

  - [Series B described as "hardest" round due to being "in between" vision and numbers-driven investors](https://fathom.video/share/dstGpQESj4aYGXzxejWtdkbWtxcSnaAA?tab=summary&timestamp=20.0)
  - [Extreme variability in investor knowledge across AI, go-to-market, and marketing](https://fathom.video/share/dstGpQESj4aYGXzxejWtdkbWtxcSnaAA?tab=summary&timestamp=32.0)
  - [Some unrealistic expectations (e.g., IPO plans within 3-5 years for \~$100M market cap company)](https://fathom.video/share/dstGpQESj4aYGXzxejWtdkbWtxcSnaAA?tab=summary&timestamp=54.0)
  - [Process has forced clarity of thinking and optimization strategies](https://fathom.video/share/dstGpQESj4aYGXzxejWtdkbWtxcSnaAA?tab=summary&timestamp=76.0)
  - [Iconic (investor) understood but passed due to lack of proven renewal cycles](https://fathom.video/share/dstGpQESj4aYGXzxejWtdkbWtxcSnaAA?tab=summary&timestamp=124.0)

### Internal Communication & Understanding

  - [Concern that if investors struggle to understand after 3-5 meetings, employees may face similar challenges](https://fathom.video/share/dstGpQESj4aYGXzxejWtdkbWtxcSnaAA?tab=summary&timestamp=133.0)
  - [Example: George took \~3 months to fully grasp everything despite proximity](https://fathom.video/share/dstGpQESj4aYGXzxejWtdkbWtxcSnaAA?tab=summary&timestamp=148.0)
  - [Need for better communication of individual roles and company objectives](https://fathom.video/share/dstGpQESj4aYGXzxejWtdkbWtxcSnaAA?tab=summary&timestamp=162.0)
  - [Plan to nail down clearer story, priorities, and metrics to share with company within a week](https://fathom.video/share/dstGpQESj4aYGXzxejWtdkbWtxcSnaAA?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)

### Financial Position & Strategy

  - [Current month's collection: 980K](https://fathom.video/share/dstGpQESj4aYGXzxejWtdkbWtxcSnaAA?tab=summary&timestamp=197.0)
  - [Low burn rate and efficient operations](https://fathom.video/share/dstGpQESj4aYGXzxejWtdkbWtxcSnaAA?tab=summary&timestamp=209.0)
  - [Success viewed as within control with current resources; additional capital would be "fuel" not determining factor](https://fathom.video/share/dstGpQESj4aYGXzxejWtdkbWtxcSnaAA?tab=summary&timestamp=209.0)
  - [May need to postpone fundraising efforts, potentially resuming early next year](https://fathom.video/share/dstGpQESj4aYGXzxejWtdkbWtxcSnaAA?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)

### Investor Perspectives & Market Challenges

  - [No "bridge burning," but varied concerns:](https://fathom.video/share/dstGpQESj4aYGXzxejWtdkbWtxcSnaAA?tab=summary&timestamp=255.0)
      - [Scaling services (need for clearer roadmap)](https://fathom.video/share/dstGpQESj4aYGXzxejWtdkbWtxcSnaAA?tab=summary&timestamp=270.0)
      - [Desire for more cycles/expansions](https://fathom.video/share/dstGpQESj4aYGXzxejWtdkbWtxcSnaAA?tab=summary&timestamp=284.0)
  - [Men (investor) more aligned with vision/people focus, 10-15 year investment horizon](https://fathom.video/share/dstGpQESj4aYGXzxejWtdkbWtxcSnaAA?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Market category (marketing) creates additional skepticism due to past "burns"](https://fathom.video/share/dstGpQESj4aYGXzxejWtdkbWtxcSnaAA?tab=summary&timestamp=335.0)
  - [Lack of excitement for comparisons like Sprinklr (small multiple)](https://fathom.video/share/dstGpQESj4aYGXzxejWtdkbWtxcSnaAA?tab=summary&timestamp=344.0)

### Operational Priorities

  - [Renewal and retention identified as crucial focus for next 6 months](https://fathom.video/share/dstGpQESj4aYGXzxejWtdkbWtxcSnaAA?tab=summary&timestamp=106.0)
  - [Need for intentional team prioritization and establishing operational guardrails](https://fathom.video/share/dstGpQESj4aYGXzxejWtdkbWtxcSnaAA?tab=summary&timestamp=227.0)
  - [Developing clearer roadmap for scaling services](https://fathom.video/share/dstGpQESj4aYGXzxejWtdkbWtxcSnaAA?tab=summary&timestamp=270.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Finalize clearer narrative, priorities, and metrics to communicate to company within \~1 week](https://fathom.video/share/dstGpQESj4aYGXzxejWtdkbWtxcSnaAA?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Meeting with Men (investor) scheduled for Monday](https://fathom.video/share/dstGpQESj4aYGXzxejWtdkbWtxcSnaAA?tab=summary&timestamp=312.0)
  - [Refine strategy for addressing investor concerns about scaling services](https://fathom.video/share/dstGpQESj4aYGXzxejWtdkbWtxcSnaAA?tab=summary&timestamp=270.0)
  - [Develop plan to improve internal communication and role clarity](https://fathom.video/share/dstGpQESj4aYGXzxejWtdkbWtxcSnaAA?tab=summary&timestamp=162.0)
  - [Focus on optimizing renewal and retention metrics over next 6 months](https://fathom.video/share/dstGpQESj4aYGXzxejWtdkbWtxcSnaAA?tab=summary&timestamp=106.0)

action_items.description: Improve personal communication - better connect dots for employees re: their roles & company optimization goals
Develop plan to address investor concerns re: renewal/retention cycles. Prep for potential fundraising in early next year.
Create clear company story - priorities, measurements, guardrails. Present to company within ~1 week.
